---
name: Adapter request
about: Propose a new enforcement adapter or integration target
title: ""
labels: adapter
assignees: ""
---

## Integration Target

What tool, platform, protocol, or workflow should be adapted?

## Action Boundary

What real action will the adapter control before execution?

## Example Actions

- `example.action`

## Required Decisions

Which effects must be supported?

- allow
- deny
- dry_run
- require_approval

## Security Impact

What can go wrong if this adapter allows too much, logs secrets, or fails open?

## Verification

What tests or fixtures should prove the adapter enforces decisions correctly?
